title: Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications
text:
Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications - SupportGoWhere
Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications
Share link
A national credential system that trains, develops, assesses and certifies skills and competencies for the workforce.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
WSQ is a national credential system for skills and competencies certification
No academic prerequisites required for entry, recognises prior work experience and credentials
Collapse all sections
About this support

Acquire job role-specific skills and competencies through competency-based training

Gain portable credentials to improve employability and mobility

Access to bite-sized modules leading to Statements of Attainment and full WSQ qualifications

Quality assured qualifications awarded by SkillsFuture Singapore or in partnership with established awarding bodies

Who is this for?

Open to all individuals, regardless of academic background

Recognises prior learning and work experience

How to apply?

To enrol in Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) courses:

Visit the MySkillsFuture portal to browse available WSQ courses

Register for the course through the training provider

Complete the course to receive a Statement of Attainment or WSQ qualification

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours:
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry
